'''bazhala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seacatch|seacatch]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seacatch|seacatch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bazhala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzhælæth|bæzhælæth]] || [[word:bæzhælæj|bæzhælæj]] || [[word:bæzhælæsh|bæzhælæsh]] || [[word:bæzhælæ|bæzhælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhazhalath|bazhazhalath]] || [[word:bazhazhalaj|bazhazhalaj]] || [[word:bazhazhalash|bazhazhalash]] || [[word:bazhazhala|bazhazhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhalath|bazhalath]] || [[word:bazhalaj|bazhalaj]] || [[word:bazhalash|bazhalash]] || [[word:bazhala|bazhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhaflath|bazhaflath]] || [[word:bazhaflaj|bazhaflaj]] || [[word:bazhaflash|bazhaflash]] || [[word:bazhaflaf|bazhaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazhalatha|bazhalatha]] || [[word:bazhalaja|bazhalaja]] || [[word:bazhalasha|bazhalasha]] || [[word:bazhalaka|bazhalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazhalath|bazhalath]] || [[word:bazhalaj|bazhalaj]] || [[word:bazhalash|bazhalash]] || [[word:bazhala|bazhala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazhalathal|bazhalathal]] || [[word:bazhalajal|bazhalajal]] || [[word:bazhalashal|bazhalashal]] || [[word:bazhalakal|bazhalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazhalathatha|bazhalathatha]] || [[word:bazhalajaja|bazhalajaja]] || [[word:bazhalashasha|bazhalashasha]] || [[word:bazhalaka|bazhalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazhalathan|bazhalathan]] || [[word:bazhalajan|bazhalajan]] || [[word:bazhalashan|bazhalashan]] || [[word:bazhalakan|bazhalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazhalathaoro|bazhalathaoro]] || [[word:bazhalajaoro|bazhalajaoro]] || [[word:bazhalashaoro|bazhalashaoro]] || [[word:bazhalakaoro|bazhalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
